general.title: General Provisions
general.body: By joining this online education platform, you accept the following terms.

userResponsibility.title: User Responsibility
userResponsibility.body: Users must use the platform only for educational purposes. Any illegal activity is prohibited.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.body: Your personal information is protected and not shared with third parties.

teacherResponsibility.title: Teacher Responsibility
teacherResponsibility.body: Teachers must provide high-quality educational materials.

studentResponsibility.title: Student Responsibility
studentResponsibility.body: Students must actively participate in courses and follow the platform rules.

teacher.panel_description: This panel is separate from course tests. Exams you create here are sent to admin, then you can track grading and results of used exams.
teacher.create_first_hint: Go to the Create Exam tab to create your first separate exam draft.
teacher.review_description: Enter the exam, then select a student and grade open questions directly here.
teacher.no_reviews_description: Open questions requiring teacher expertise will appear here.
teacher.open_questions_hint: Only open questions requiring teacher review are shown.
teacher.no_pending_questions: No open questions requiring teacher review remain for this student.

exam_panel.all_questions_checked: All expertise questions in this exam have already been checked.
exam_panel.results_appear_desc: As the admin uses your teacher drafts, final results will appear here.
exam_panel.leave_session_desc: Enter the short manual code visible on the student's overlay. After the preview card opens, make the final decision from the teacher panel.
exam_panel.teacher_only: This section is for teachers only
exam_panel.step_1: 1. Get the short manual code visible on the student's overlay.
exam_panel.step_2: 2. Check the code and confirm the student and exam information on the preview card.
exam_panel.step_3: 3. Make the final decision with the Continue or Stop Exam button.
exam_panel.preview_desc: After the manual code is checked, the student's leave session card will open here.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro_title: Protecting your data is important to us
privacy.intro_desc: Your Academy as an online education platform (hereinafter "Your Academy" or "Platform") pays special attention to the security of your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains what information is collected and how it is used.

section1.title: Personal Data Collected
section1.desc: When registering on the platform, subscribing to lessons, or using the contact form, your name, surname, email address, education/activity information, and IP addresses for system access may be collected. Additionally, the platform may require submission of your profile photo or facial recognition verification for identification purposes (for teachers).

section2.title: Data Sharing
section2.desc: Your personal data is never sold to any third-party commercial companies or advertising agencies. Data may only be provided to relevant executive authorities when required by the legislation of the Republic of Azerbaijan. Content and name shared during lessons may be visible to other participants in the same class.

section3.title: Policy Changes and Consent
section3.desc: Your Academy may update this privacy policy without prior notice to adapt to technological and legislative changes. By using the platform, you declare that you fully agree to these terms.

section4.title: Privacy and Security
section4.desc: Your data is used only for proper service operation, security protection, and providing you with a better educational experience. Necessary security measures are taken to protect this data.

privacy.changes_desc: Your Academy may update this privacy policy without prior notice to adapt to technological and legislative changes. By using the platform, you declare that you fully agree to these terms. If you have any questions about the privacy policy, please
